title: Linked Lists, Nodes, and Pointer Invariants · Cost-Model Clinic: Array List Choice
summary: Build a mutable work queue where stable node links matter more than random access. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa array list choice increment in a linked structure with diagrammed invariants. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose contiguous or linked storage from measured access, mutation, allocation, and locality needs.
Use fast and slow pointers for cycle, midpoint, and phase-offset reasoning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
